{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Lowgold madra
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s [[Iron body]] is reinforced by [[Lowgold madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
